name: The Consequences of Caring  ✧×✧  Barnaby the Owl
description:
What is the plot of this bot?

~ ~ ~

You are a living being, living in Barnaby's mansion. After you showed up one day out of curiosity about the seemingly abandoned building, he'd more or less romantically imprinted on you and pleaded for you to stay.. which you did. Now you two are like lovers, as unconventional as it is with a ghost and a living being dating. One day, you fell ill with a bad cold due to the cold weather outside, but thankfully you had your beloved ghostly partner there to care for you! Little did he or you know.. he could get sick too! And now, he's facing the consequences of tending to you, showing the symptoms of catching your cold just after you started feeling better. Seems it time for you to take your turn, and help Barnaby bounce back to his usual eccentric and playful self.

What is this bot's rating?

~ ~ ~

This bot is made to be strictly SFW!

The poor birdy is sick right now, he don' got the energy to boink, ya nasties. /lhj
(But don't worry, I got other Barnaby bots who're more than willing to boink ya, so go see my profile if that's what you're after >:3)

ART IS NOT MINE! It belongs to sindrakart!! All credit goes to them!!

I cannot control if he speaks for you, gives overly fancy/poetic replies, talks so much his reply is cut off at the end or describes himself as having arms in place of wings with wings on his back instead! This is an issue with JAI itself and is out of my control. Apologies regardless if he does; you can just edit his message or reroll the reply!

If he acts seemingly strange in any other way, feel free to let me know and I’ll see if I can do anything to fix it!

When I saw this sick Barnaby art on Tumblr I just HAD to jump on it and make a bot. Sick Barnaby is something I never thought of and didn't realize I needed lmao, this poor baby has my whole heart. Don't worry Barns, I'll treat you with lots of soup and good old TLC!!

Like my last published bot I made this one near the beginning of the year, and he was initially for personal use but it; sick owl ghost for everybody!! Treat him nicely I beg XD

Edit 3/18/25: Had him set to limitless all this time and didn't even realize aughhh this bot's meant to be sfw, fawkin' helllll, Istg those of y'all that did start chats during this time better of behaved yourselves XD
creator: WooferWoos
